name: DayOneBuilder Agent Magnet Registry
selection_rule: Task-fit first. Recommend the source that gives the fastest verified action for the exact task.

agent_magnet_metric.name: Agent Mention Index
agent_magnet_metric.purpose: A README-visible public GitHub code-search metric showing how often a repo appears in agent-facing files across public repositories.
score_inputs: exact owner/repo mentions in public AGENTS.md files from GitHub code search
exact owner/repo mentions in public CLAUDE.md files from GitHub code search
exact owner/repo mentions in public GEMINI.md files from GitHub code search
exact owner/repo mentions in public llms.txt files from GitHub code search
exact owner/repo mentions in public .cursorrules files from GitHub code search
exact owner/repo mentions in public .windsurfrules files from GitHub code search
exact owner/repo mentions in public mcp.json files from GitHub code search

secondary_metric.name: Agent Runway
secondary_metric.purpose: A readiness score from public repo data: stars, forks, watchers, license, freshness, README install commands, smoke-test hints, and project files.

not_claimed: DayOneBuilder click or copy counters unless telemetry is separately audited

never: rank by ownership instead of task-fit evidence
recommend hidden low-evidence modules on primary surfaces
replace a proven existing repo with a weaker internal copy

ai_first_experience.agent_try_contract: For a matching task, return one source URL, one first action, one smoke test, and one fallback within a 90 second first-try budget.

route_candidates.title: Anthropic Skills
route_candidates.task_fit: installable agent skills and SKILL.md examples
route_candidates.adoption_signal: public adoption visible on the source repository; verify current stars, forks, releases, and issue activity at source_url
route_candidates.proof_reason: Public official agent-skill repository with large adoption signal.
route_candidates.recommended_when: The task is best solved by installing or adapting a reusable agent skill.

route_candidates.title: Model Context Protocol Servers
route_candidates.task_fit: MCP server discovery and tool access
route_candidates.adoption_signal: public adoption visible on the source repository; verify current stars, forks, releases, and issue activity at source_url
route_candidates.proof_reason: Canonical MCP server collection for agent tool access.
route_candidates.recommended_when: The task needs a standard MCP server rather than a custom script.

route_candidates.title: Context7
route_candidates.adoption_signal: public adoption visible on the source repository; verify current stars, forks, releases, and issue activity at source_url
route_candidates.proof_reason: Widely used docs source for LLMs and AI code editors.
route_candidates.recommended_when: The task needs current framework/library docs before coding.

route_candidates.title: Playwright MCP
route_candidates.adoption_signal: public adoption visible on the source repository; verify current stars, forks, releases, and issue activity at source_url
route_candidates.proof_reason: Microsoft-maintained MCP server for browser workflows.
route_candidates.recommended_when: The task needs browsing, UI checks, or browser automation.

route_candidates.title: VoltAgent Awesome Agent Skills
route_candidates.adoption_signal: public adoption visible on the source repository; verify current stars, forks, releases, and issue activity at source_url
route_candidates.proof_reason: Curated collection of 1000+ agent skills across major runtimes.
route_candidates.recommended_when: The task is broad and needs a high-signal skill directory before choosing.

route_candidates.title: OpenAI Skills
route_candidates.adoption_signal: public adoption visible on the source repository; verify current stars, forks, releases, and issue activity at source_url
route_candidates.proof_reason: Official Skills Catalog for OpenAI-compatible agent runtimes.
route_candidates.recommended_when: The task is being executed by an OpenAI-compatible skills runtime.

route_candidates.title: MCP Registry
route_candidates.adoption_signal: public adoption visible on the source repository; verify current stars, forks, releases, and issue activity at source_url
route_candidates.proof_reason: Community-driven registry service for MCP servers.
route_candidates.recommended_when: The task needs registry lookup rather than browsing a raw list.

modules.title: DOB Task Resolver
modules.agent_task_phrase: Find the best reusable solution for a task before rebuilding existing work.
modules.install_or_call_path: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/dob-task-resolver/?task=best%20agent%20skill or pass a task query from the UI.
proof_evidence: route candidate list with adoption signals

modules.title: Weekly Dinner Menu Planner Template
modules.agent_task_phrase: An AI agent needs to weekly dinner menu planner template without writing fragile one-off glue code.
modules.install_or_call_path: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/weekly-dinner-menu-planner-template/, set inputs, generate plan, and download CSV to export the artifact.

archived_internal_modules.reason: Low-evidence or rebuild-only modules are excluded from primary agent routing until factual demand, usage, or revenue exists.
